overall.description: A cinematic cyberpunk game engine sequence showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban street under elevated highways, entering a dimly lit parking garage, and exiting back to the bustling street. The environment features futuristic East Asian architectural elements, holographic advertisements, and dynamic lighting typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping street beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian street, passing various storefronts and NPCs under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: woman with green hair and cybernetic arm implants walking ahead of the camera
person sitting at a small round table outside a shop, looking at a device

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with green metallic accents and exposed pipes
large glowing red and white sign with Korean text advertising a burger shop
tall holographic advertisements on building facades displaying animated content
row of commercial storefronts with illuminated signage and display windows
string of traditional red lanterns hanging from the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian street beneath a massive elevated highway, illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. The camera follows a woman with distinctive green hair and cybernetic implants as she walks past various storefronts, including a burger shop with prominent Korean signage. Other pedestrians walk in mixed directions, and a person sits at an outdoor table near the shop fronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit multi-level parking garage with exposed infrastructure

events.description: enters dimly lit indoor parking garage from the covered pedestrian street, losing all natural light
passes through a darker section of the garage with minimal overhead lighting, creating deep shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through the nearly empty parking garage, passing between concrete pillars and parked vehicles

entered.detail: massive square concrete support columns with parking level signs attached
illuminated red signs with white numbers indicating parking levels 1 and 2
sloped concrete ramps connecting different parking levels
exposed industrial ductwork and ventilation systems on the ceiling
enclosed service desks and utility stations along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dimly lit, cavernous parking garage with exposed concrete infrastructure and minimal artificial lighting. The environment is nearly deserted, with only a few parked vehicles visible between the massive support pillars. The camera moves through increasingly darker sections of the garage, passing illuminated level indicators and service counters, before approaching the exit ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with vehicle traffic and neon signage

events.description: exits the parking garage back to the covered street, returning to the neon-lit environment with visible sky and traffic
camera slows down while observing the street traffic and neon-lit surroundings under the highway

agents.ego_description: exiting the garage and walking along the street under the elevated highway, observing vehicle traffic and neon reflections on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving along the street beneath the elevated highway
pedestrian in pink jacket walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern glass and steel building with illuminated interior visible through windows
tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk under the highway structure
metal railings separating the pedestrian walkway from the vehicle street
metal scaffolding structure with 'NO ENTRY' signage on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the parking garage back into the vibrant neon-lit street, re-emerging under the massive elevated highway structure. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from digital billboards and building signage. A blue sports car drives past on the left while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, and the camera slows to observe the bustling cyberpunk cityscape with palm trees and modern glass buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian thoroughfare through a desolate concrete void and back into the bustling urban glow. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, following a woman with green hair and cybernetic implants past holographic advertisements and storefronts with Korean signage. As she moves forward, the scene shifts abruptly into a dimly lit, cavernous parking garage, where the colorful lights are replaced by exposed concrete pillars and sparse artificial lighting. The camera then navigates through the increasingly dark interior and past service counters before emerging from the exit ramp back into the open air. Finally, the environment expands once more into the vivid cityscape, where wet pavement reflects digital billboards and a blue sports car speeds past palm trees and modern glass buildings.
